title: Ubiquiti Panic Bar
description: The UACC-PanicBar door panic hardware allows safe and quick evacuation of a building in case of an emergency. The bar is equipped with a switching relay with contact rating 30 V DC / 1 A. When the bar is pressed, the relay closes; when it is released, the relay opens Supported Door Width: 711 mm - 914 mm Supported Door Thickness: 44 mm - 51 mm (metal or wood) Enclosure Material: Aluminum, stainless steel Rele: Contact rating 30 V DC / 1 A, Push = Short/Release = Open Ubiquiti Panic Bar Mounting accesories
